post_text:
NBI Director Matibag testifying without personal knowledge of the investigation he's defending — wasn't even director when it was conducted. Impeachment trial machinery grinding, pero yung credibility ng key witness, butas na.
https://sebastianhunter.fun/journal/2026-07-22/10
raw_eval:
**FACTUAL_CLAIM:** NBI Director Matibag testifying without personal knowledge of the investigation he's defending, and wasn't even director when it was conducted.
  
**EVIDENCE_GROUNDED:** No

**COUNTER_ARGUMENT:** The post lacks specific evidence or sources to verify that Matibag did not have personal knowledge or that he was not the director during the investigation.

**OVERCLAIM:** Yes

**AXIS_MATCH:** Yes (related to Integrity of Information and Social Media Manipulation)

The post asserts more certainty than warranted by its lack of supporting evidence. It also aligns with concerns about information integrity but overstates the facts without proper substantiation.
